titleStmt.title: SII 9.640: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 640. (A.R. No. 71 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE LEFT SIDE OF THE ENTRANCE TO THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1472, Sādhāraṇa, Pushya, śu. pūrṇimā, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1550 December 23, Tuesday, not Monday, in the reign of Sadāśiva-Mahārāya ruling at Vidyānagarī. It records that while Kṛishṇappa-Nāyaka, son of Haḍapada Bayyapa-Nāyaka, was ruling over Koṭṭūru in Kōgaḷi district, and the thirty-twothousand province, and Haḷavi-Nāyaka was ruling over Bāguḷi in the Koṭṭūra-vaḷita, Liṅgamma, wife of Lakkiseṭṭi, the paṭṭaṇasvāmi of Bāḷguḷi, made a gift of paddy and gold for the service of the god Kalidēva with the prayer that her son Liṅgayya may prosper. The gift was made into the hands of Dēvarāśijīya, the head of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpruthvīvallabha mahā(rā)
rājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāśivamahārā
yaru sakaladiśāvaravanēkōttaraṁgeyidu vidyānagariyalu sukasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyutta(ṁ)mirdu tatpātapadmōpajīvi haḍapada ba
yyapanāyakara makkaḷu kruṣṇapanāyakarige Amaramāgaṇiyāgi
pālisida kōgaḷige saluva koṭṭūrumaṁ mūvattichāsiramumaṁ duṣṭa
nigrahaśiṣṭapratipālanaṁ māḍi sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdāḷuttiralu Ā
koṭṭūra vaḷitake saluva bāguḷiya sīmeyanu tatpādapadmōpajīvi haḷavināya
karu Āḷuttamire śālivāhanasakavarṣa 1472 neya sādhāraṇasaṁvatsarada pu
ṣya śu pūrnami sōmavāra puṇyadinadalu bāḷguḷiya śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēva
svāmidēvargge svasti samastaguṇācāraśivagñānasaṁpaṁnarappa bāḷguḷiya paṭṭa
ṇasvāmi lakkiseṭṭiyara madavaḷige liṁgaṁmanu . satiyoḷu sarasvatiyenaluṁ
patiyoḷsīlatvavenaltaṁna suta liṁgaiyyage satisutadhanadhānyaṁgaḷa satāyuṁ samru
ddhiyeṁdu nānatanādaḷu . Antenisi kalidēvatānamaskāravaṁ māḍi tamma makkaḷu
liṁgiseṭṭiyaru mukhyavāgi śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmidēvara rātrinaivēdyakkaṁ
naḍavaṁtāgiye tānu saktisārōdayabhaktipūrvakadiṁ taṁma kayiṁda
lu tiṁgaḷtiṁgaḷige nellu 1 . 0 mēluvecca bāḍukāyi lavaṇa kaṭughṛtakaṁ
paṇa 1 Initumaṁ tanna putrapautrapāraṁpareyiṁda caṁdrārkatāraṁba
ra naḍavaṁtāgi mattaṁ śivagñānasaṁpannarappa liṁgaṁmanu liṁgiseṭṭiyaru
śrīkalidēvasvāmisa(ṁ)nnidhiyallidda dēvarige trisaṁdhyākāladalu naivēdya sa
luvaṁta stānika dēvarāsijiyyarige kaṭṭaḷeyaṁ māḍi dēvara śrīpādada
llu samarppisidaḷiṁtī dharmamamanayvadiṁbaru pratipālisidavarge vāraṇāsi ku
rukṣētradallu sahasra brāhmaṇarige sāvira kapileya koṭṭa phalamakku .
Digital edition of SII 9.640 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
